calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Leonard Holidy, individually and dba Holidy Construction.
Default was entered against defendant on May 8, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 8, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 15, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Leonard Holidy, individually and dba Holidy Construction as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,973.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,432.26.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,946.25.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
